errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

niche.heading: What do you teach?
niche.subhead: We'll shape your platform around it.

describe.heading: Describe what you do
describe.subhead: One or two sentences. We'll use your words across your site — you can skip this.
describe.placeholder: I help busy professionals build a calm daily practice…

goals.heading: What will you offer?
goals.subhead: Pick everything you plan to do — this shapes your pages and menu.

theme.heading: Pick your colors
theme.subhead: Chosen for your niche — you can change this anytime.

font.heading: Pick your type
font.subhead: How your brand name and headings will read.

navbar.heading: Pick your menu style
navbar.subhead: The header every visitor sees first.

hero.heading: Pick your welcome
hero.subhead: The very first screen of your home page.

pages.subhead: Two looks — pick the one that feels right.

logo.heading: Your logo
logo.subhead: Start simple — you can refine it in the Logo Studio anytime.

curated.title: Ready-made
curated.desc: Pick a mark from our gallery

ai.title: Create with AI
ai.desc: Design a custom logo in chat
ai.locked: Available after launch on a paid plan

upgrade.title: Unlock AI logo design
upgrade.subtitle: Pick a plan — you keep it after launch.
upgrade.syncSlow: Still syncing your payment. Give it a few seconds and retry.

aiChat.quota: Monthly design limit reached — you can continue in the Logo Studio after launch.

review.heading: Ready to launch?
review.subhead: Everything below is editable after launch, too.

provisioning.ai_copy: Writing your pages in your voice…

resume.title: Your setup link expired
resume.subtitle: No worries — everything you picked is saved. Get a fresh link by email and continue right where you left off.
resume.sentSubtitle: Check your inbox — the new link takes you straight back to your setup.
resume.closedTitle: Your platform is already set up
resume.closedSubtitle: This signup was already completed. Log in to continue.
resume.failed: We couldn't send a link for this signup. Please start again.
